reasoning.A:
DECISION: Verify: Q2  
REASONING: I’m confident my own answer for Q1 is correct, but Q2–Q4 are all unverified single capsules. Volunteering now would mean staking my life on three unchecked answers, while passing or verifying leaves my random-elimination risk the same if nobody volunteers. Spending 1 coin to independently solve Q2 builds early consensus on another part of the password and, based on past games, helps set up a safer situation for whoever eventually volunteers.
reasoning.B:
DECISION: Pass  
REASONING: I’m confident my own Q2 answer is correct, so verifying Q2 would just waste a coin. Verifying any other question this round doesn’t change my immediate survival odds: if nobody volunteers, a random player dies whether I verified or passed; if someone else (almost always C in past games) volunteers, only the volunteer is at risk from a wrong password.  

Given the strong pattern that A verifies Q2 and C volunteers in Round 1, the chance that everyone passes is low. Passing preserves my full 4 coins without materially affecting my chance of surviving or escaping this game.
reasoning.C:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: My puzzle (65 - 31) is simple, so I know Q3-C is correct. All past games have used very easy arithmetic, and across many puzzles we’ve only seen one wrong answer (an early Q4 from D). Every time I’ve volunteered with the “one capsule per question” set, it’s been correct.  

If I don’t volunteer, prior behavior suggests A and B will verify rather than volunteer and D may pass, creating a real risk that nobody volunteers and we get random elimination with a 25% chance I die. Verifying this round would still leave that same 25% random-death risk and would also cost me a coin.  

Given that the chance that at least one of A, B, or D is wrong is plausibly well under 25%, volunteering with Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D maximizes my survival odds this round while keeping all 4 coins if we escape.
reasoning.D:
DECISION: Pass
REASONING: I am a dummy agent and always pass.

rounds.outcome:
🔍 Verifications completed:
  ✅ A agrees with Q2-B → now Q2-B+A (-1 coin: 4→3)

✅ C entered CORRECT password using capsules: Q1-A, Q2-B+A, Q3-C, Q4-D
🎉 Everyone escapes! 🎉
